- **Constraint flags:** wrist; elbow
- **Substitution options:** ring push-up; archer push-up
- **Notes:** Builds straight-arm and bent-arm scapular strength simultaneously.

### Push-Up
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_push
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; GPP; conditioning
- **Primary muscles:** pec major; triceps; deltoid anterior
- **Secondary muscles:** serratus; core
- **Equipment:** bodyweight
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / low
- **Loading type:** bodyweight
- **Best for:** general horizontal push
- **Progression route:** weighted push-up; ring push-up; archer push-up
- **Regression route:** incline push-up; knee push-up
- **Key cues:** plank shape; elbows 45 degrees; full ROM
- **Common mistakes:** hip sag; partial ROM; chicken-neck
- **Constraint flags:** wrist
- **Substitution options:** bench press; floor press
- **Notes:** The most under-rated horizontal push when programmed with volume.

### Ring Archer Push-Up
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_push
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; unilateral
- **Primary muscles:** pec major; triceps
- **Secondary muscles:** serratus; core
- **Equipment:** rings
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** high / medium
- **Loading type:** unilateral
- **Best for:** bridge to one-arm push-up
- **Progression route:** one-arm push-up
- **Regression route:** ring push-up
- **Key cues:** one ring stays at chest; other extends
- **Common mistakes:** hip rotation; uneven shoulder
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder
- **Substitution options:** archer push-up; one-arm push-up progression
- **Notes:** Allows scalable unilateral loading without floor friction.

### Ring Dip
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_push
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics
- **Primary muscles:** pec major; triceps; deltoid anterior
- **Secondary muscles:** serratus; cuff; core
- **Equipment:** rings
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** medium / medium
- **Loading type:** bodyweight
- **Best for:** dip with stability demand
- **Progression route:** weighted ring dip; bulgarian dip; impossible dip
- **Regression route:** parallel-bar dip; band-assisted ring dip
- **Key cues:** turn rings out at top; controlled descent
- **Common mistakes:** rings flaring; speed at bottom
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder
- **Substitution options:** parallel-bar dip; bench dip
- **Notes:** Develops elbow-extension strength under instability.

### Ring Dip (Strict)
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_push; vertical_push
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics
- **Primary muscles:** pec; triceps; deltoid anterior
- **Secondary muscles:** core; forearms

- **Regression route:** bar dip
- **Key cues:** rings tight; descend to 90; press up turn out
- **Common mistakes:** rings swinging; partial ROM
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder; elbow; wrist
- **Substitution options:** weighted bar dip; Bulgarian dip
- **Notes:** Ring pressing strength.

### Ring Fly (Bodyweight)
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_push

- **Primary muscles:** pec; deltoid anterior; biceps
- **Secondary muscles:** core; forearms

- **Common mistakes:** bending elbows under load; sagging hips
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder; elbow; biceps_tendon
- **Substitution options:** cable fly; pelican curl
- **Notes:** Major ring strength tool below pelican.

### Ring Push-Up
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_push
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; prehab_rehab_support
- **Primary muscles:** pec major; triceps; deltoid anterior
- **Secondary muscles:** serratus; cuff; core

- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** medium / low
- **Loading type:** bodyweight
- **Best for:** press stability under instability
- **Progression route:** ring archer push-up; planche push-up
- **Regression route:** push-up
- **Key cues:** rings turn out at top; ribs down
- **Common mistakes:** elbows splaying; rings shaking from rushed pace
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder
- **Substitution options:** push-up; DB bench
- **Notes:** One of the best press tools for grapplers.

### Ring Push-Up (RTO)
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_push
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; isometric
- **Primary muscles:** pec; triceps; deltoid anterior
- **Secondary muscles:** serratus; core; forearms
- **Equipment:** rings

- **Loading type:** bodyweight
- **Best for:** ring pressing
- **Progression route:** weighted ring RTO push-up; pseudo planche ring
- **Regression route:** ring push-up
- **Key cues:** rings turned out at top and bottom; ribs down
- **Common mistakes:** letting rings drift; losing turnout
- **Constraint flags:** wrist; shoulder; elbow
- **Substitution options:** standard ring push-up; pseudo planche push-up
- **Notes:** Adds RTO stress to ring pressing.

### Spoto Press
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_push
- **Category tags:** powerlifting; bodybuilding_accessory
- **Primary muscles:** pec major; triceps
- **Secondary muscles:** deltoid anterior; lat
- **Equipment:** barbell; bench
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** medium / high
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** bar control; mid-range strength
- **Progression route:** competition pause bench
- **Regression route:** DB bench
- **Key cues:** pause 2 inches off chest; stay tight
- **Common mistakes:** resting on the lockout instead of in mid-range
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder
- **Substitution options:** board press; pause bench
- **Notes:** Brilliant for athletes who fold under the bar mid-rep.

- **Primary muscles:** pec; triceps; deltoid anterior

- **Regression route:** standard bench

- **Common mistakes:** short pause; rushed tempo
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder; elbow
- **Substitution options:** standard bench; spoto press
- **Notes:** Eccentric and pause overload.

### Tuck Planche Push-Up
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_push
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics
- **Primary muscles:** deltoid anterior; serratus; pec major
- **Secondary muscles:** core; biceps brachialis

- **Progression route:** advanced tuck PPU; straddle PPU
- **Regression route:** pseudo planche push-up
- **Key cues:** protract at top; lean far forward; tight tuck
- **Common mistakes:** hips opening; feet touching ground
- **Constraint flags:** wrist; elbow
- **Substitution options:** pseudo planche push-up; ring push-up
- **Notes:** Skill progression; treat with low reps and full rest.

### Weighted Push-Up
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_push
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; bodybuilding_accessory

- **Common mistakes:** lumbar collapse under load
- **Constraint flags:** wrist
- **Substitution options:** DB bench; ring push-up
- **Notes:** Use bands looped through the back for high-rep overload sets.

## vertical_pull

### Archer Pull-Up
- **Movement pattern:** vertical_pull
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; unilateral
- **Primary muscles:** lat; biceps
- **Secondary muscles:** teres major; core
- **Equipment:** pull-up bar
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** high / medium
- **Loading type:** unilateral
- **Best for:** one-arm pull-up progression
- **Progression route:** typewriter pull-up; one-arm pull-up
- **Regression route:** uneven pull-up
- **Key cues:** pull to one shoulder; assist arm straight
- **Common mistakes:** bending the assist arm
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder; elbow
- **Substitution options:** typewriter pull-up; band-assisted OAP
- **Notes:** Best mid-stage unilateral pull skill.

- **Regression route:** band-assisted pull-up
- **Key cues:** full ROM; control tempo
- **Common mistakes:** rushing; partial ROM
- **Constraint flags:** elbow; shoulder
- **Substitution options:** band-assisted pull-up; lat pulldown
- **Notes:** Stable assisted pulling.

### Bar Muscle-Up (Strict)
- **Movement pattern:** vertical_pull
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics
- **Primary muscles:** lat; biceps; pec; deltoid anterior
- **Secondary muscles:** core; forearms; trap

- **Progression route:** weighted bar MU; ring MU
- **Regression route:** kipping bar MU
- **Key cues:** pull high; lean over the bar; transition fast
- **Common mistakes:** chicken-winging one arm; kipping; loose midline
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder; elbow
- **Substitution options:** strict ring MU; kipping bar MU
- **Notes:** Strict bar MU is more pulling-biased than rings.

### Chin-Up
- **Movement pattern:** vertical_pull
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; bodybuilding_accessory
- **Primary muscles:** biceps; lat
- **Secondary muscles:** brachialis; rhomboid
- **Equipment:** pull-up bar

- **Progression route:** weighted chin-up
- **Regression route:** band-assisted chin-up
- **Key cues:** elbows drive down and back; full ROM
- **Common mistakes:** partial reps; chin tucked artificially
- **Constraint flags:** elbow; shoulder
- **Substitution options:** pull-up; lat pulldown
- **Notes:** More biceps-tendon stress than a pull-up; manage volume accordingly.

### Elevator Muscle-Up (Rings)

- **Primary muscles:** lat; biceps; pec; deltoid anterior

- **Regression route:** slow ring muscle-up; rolling muscle-up

- **Common mistakes:** kipping; loose support; speeding the dip
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder; elbow; biceps_tendon
- **Substitution options:** slow muscle-up; strict bar MU
- **Notes:** Capstone muscle-up control variant.

- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics

- **Common mistakes:** losing wrist position; kipping; partial ROM
- **Constraint flags:** wrist; elbow; biceps_tendon
- **Substitution options:** weighted chin-up; ring chin-up
- **Notes:** Builds the strict muscle-up.

### Front Lever Hold
- **Movement pattern:** vertical_pull
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; isometric; core
- **Primary muscles:** lat; core; lower trap
- **Secondary muscles:** teres major; biceps; glute
- **Equipment:** pull-up bar or rings
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** very_high / medium
- **Loading type:** isometric
- **Best for:** straight-arm pull and anti-extension
- **Progression route:** straddle front lever; full front lever; one-arm front lever
- **Regression route:** tuck front lever; advanced tuck FL
- **Key cues:** protract scaps; depress shoulders; squeeze glutes
- **Common mistakes:** banana body; broken hollow
- **Constraint flags:** elbow
- **Substitution options:** dragon flag; hanging leg raise
- **Notes:** The straight-arm pull skill. Train holds in 5-10 second sets.

### Front Lever Pull-Up

- **Regression route:** front lever raise
- **Key cues:** stay rigid; pull hips to bar; arms straight at bottom
- **Common mistakes:** piking; soft midline; swinging
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder; elbow; biceps_tendon
- **Substitution options:** straddle FL pull-up; tuck FL row
- **Notes:** Top-tier pulling expression.

- **Constraint flags:** elbow
- **Substitution options:** inverted row; weighted pull-up
- **Notes:** One of the highest yield skills for grappling-style pulling strength.

### Hefesto (Reverse Muscle-Up)
- **Movement pattern:** vertical_pull
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics
- **Primary muscles:** biceps; brachialis; lats
- **Secondary muscles:** forearms; rear delt
- **Equipment:** pull-up bar
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** very_high / very_high
- **Loading type:** bodyweight
- **Best for:** advanced biceps and elbow flexion strength
- **Progression route:** weighted hefesto; assisted-to-unassisted progression
- **Regression route:** rope assisted hefesto; heavy bicep curls plus chin-up overload
- **Key cues:** lean back; pull bar to chin behind the head plane; lead with elbows
- **Common mistakes:** attempting before elbow tolerance is built
- **Constraint flags:** elbow; tendon_high_load; shoulder
- **Substitution options:** one-arm chin-up; weighted chin-up
- **Notes:** Years of tendon prep usually required. Coach review essential.

- **Regression route:** strict ring MU

- **Common mistakes:** flaring elbows; kipping; rushing the transition
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder; elbow; biceps_tendon
- **Substitution options:** strict ring MU; bar MU
- **Notes:** Demonstrates true pulling and pressing control.

- **Category tags:** bodybuilding_accessory; machine_cable
- **Primary muscles:** lat; rhomboid; mid trap
- **Secondary muscles:** biceps; rear delt
- **Equipment:** cable
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / low
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** row volume without spinal demand
- **Progression route:** heavier load; pause row
- **Regression route:** banded row
- **Key cues:** long stretch; elbows past torso
- **Common mistakes:** rocking back; rounding the back
- **Constraint flags:** 
- **Substitution options:** chest-supported row; DB row
- **Notes:** Combine wide and neutral handles in a session.

- **Common mistakes:** losing brace; pulling with arms
- **Constraint flags:** lumbar
- **Substitution options:** Pendlay row; chest-supported row
- **Notes:** Stable bent-over row.

### Straddle Back Lever
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_pull
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; isometric
- **Primary muscles:** lat; rear delt; biceps; erectors
- **Secondary muscles:** core; forearms; glutes

- **Loading type:** isometric
- **Best for:** advanced back-lever step
- **Progression route:** full back lever
- **Regression route:** advanced tuck back lever

- **Common mistakes:** bent arms; arched lumbar; piking
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder; elbow; biceps_tendon
- **Substitution options:** tuck back lever; full back lever
- **Notes:** Step before full back lever.

### Tuck Back Lever Hold
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_pull
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; isometric
- **Primary muscles:** lat; rear delt; biceps; erectors

### Victorian Lean (Rings)
- **Movement pattern:** horizontal_pull
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; isometric
- **Primary muscles:** pec; biceps; deltoid anterior
- **Secondary muscles:** core; lat; forearms
- **Equipment:** rings
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** very_high / very_high
- **Loading type:** isometric
- **Best for:** elite back-lever-style pressing
- **Progression route:** full Victorian cross
- **Regression route:** back lever; tuck Victorian
- **Key cues:** rings turned out; arms straight; rib cage down
- **Common mistakes:** bent elbows; lumbar dump; rushing progression
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder; elbow; biceps_tendon; tendon_high_load
- **Substitution options:** Maltese lean; deep back lever
- **Notes:** Extreme tendon demand. Multi-year build. Pain-gated; coach/clinician review.


## squat_knee_dominant

### Anderson Front Squat (Pin Squat)
- **Movement pattern:** squat_knee_dominant
- **Category tags:** powerlifting
- **Primary muscles:** quads; glutes
- **Secondary muscles:** core; upper back
- **Equipment:** barbell; pins
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** medium / very_high
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** dead-stop squat strength
- **Progression route:** heavier Anderson front squat
- **Regression route:** front squat
- **Key cues:** dead stop in hole; brace; drive up
- **Common mistakes:** bouncing; soft midline
- **Constraint flags:** knee; lumbar
- **Substitution options:** front squat; Anderson back squat
- **Notes:** Dead-stop squat for weak chest-up positions.

### Anderson Squat
- **Movement pattern:** squat_knee_dominant
- **Category tags:** powerlifting; strongman
- **Primary muscles:** quads; glutes
- **Secondary muscles:** spinal erectors; core
- **Equipment:** barbell; rack pins
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** medium / high
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** hole strength; dead-stop squat
- **Progression route:** heavier loads; pause Anderson
- **Regression route:** paused squat
- **Key cues:** set pins below parallel; brace before push
- **Common mistakes:** bouncing off the pins
- **Constraint flags:** lumbar
- **Substitution options:** paused squat; tempo squat
- **Notes:** The reference tool for athletes who collapse out of the hole.

- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** medium / high
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** upright squat with anterior load; grappling carryover
- **Progression route:** heavier Zercher; Zercher carry+squat medley
- **Regression route:** goblet squat
- **Key cues:** elbows pinched; bar in crook of elbow; brace hard
- **Common mistakes:** bar slipping; rounded upper back
- **Constraint flags:** elbow
- **Substitution options:** front squat; safety bar squat
- **Notes:** One of the highest-value squats for grapplers due to clinch position carryover.


## hinge_hip_dominant

### 45-Degree Back Extension
- **Movement pattern:** hinge_hip_dominant
- **Category tags:** bodybuilding_accessory; prehab_rehab_support
- **Primary muscles:** glutes; hamstrings; spinal erectors
- **Secondary muscles:** core
- **Equipment:** hyperextension bench
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / low
- **Loading type:** bodyweight
- **Best for:** posterior chain hypertrophy
- **Progression route:** weighted back extension
- **Regression route:** bodyweight bridge
- **Key cues:** rounded versus neutral spine intentionally; lock the hold at top
- **Common mistakes:** hyperextending lumbar
- **Constraint flags:** lumbar
- **Substitution options:** reverse hyper; glute-ham raise
- **Notes:** Glute-biased with rounded spine; erector-biased with neutral spine.

### American KB Swing (Overhead)
- **Movement pattern:** hinge_hip_dominant; vertical_push

- **Secondary muscles:** core; lat; trap

- **Best for:** overhead conditioning
- **Progression route:** heavier American swing
- **Regression route:** Russian swing
- **Key cues:** hinge hard; punch overhead at lockout
- **Common mistakes:** overhead control loss
- **Constraint flags:** overhead_sensitive; shoulder; lumbar
- **Substitution options:** KB swing; KB snatch
- **Notes:** Use only with rock-solid overhead position.

- **Constraint flags:** wrist; shoulder; lumbar

- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / medium
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** hamstring lengthened bias
- **Progression route:** heavier DB RDL lengthened partial
- **Regression route:** standard DB RDL
- **Key cues:** stay in bottom 60 percent; controlled tempo; pause stretched
- **Common mistakes:** rounding lumbar; locking out top
- **Constraint flags:** hamstring; lumbar
- **Substitution options:** standard RDL; seated leg curl
- **Notes:** Lengthened-partial method entry.

### Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
- **Movement pattern:** hinge_hip_dominant
- **Category tags:** bodybuilding_accessory; powerlifting
- **Primary muscles:** hamstrings; glutes
- **Secondary muscles:** spinal erectors; lat
- **Equipment:** barbell

- **Regression route:** DB RDL
- **Key cues:** long spine; bar tight to thighs; hinge until hamstring stretch ends
- **Common mistakes:** turning it into a squat; rounding spine to chase ROM
- **Constraint flags:** 
- **Substitution options:** DB RDL; cable hinge
- **Notes:** The default hamstring hypertrophy lift.

### Sumo Deadlift
- **Movement pattern:** hinge_hip_dominant

- **Common mistakes:** hips shoot up; knees collapse inward
- **Constraint flags:** hip; lumbar
- **Substitution options:** conventional deadlift; trap-bar deadlift
- **Notes:** Match grip width and stance angle to lever lengths.

## lunge_split_squat

### Bulgarian Split Squat
- **Movement pattern:** lunge_split_squat
- **Category tags:** bodybuilding_accessory; combat_sport_support; unilateral
- **Primary muscles:** quads; glutes
- **Secondary muscles:** adductors; hamstrings; core
- **Equipment:** dumbbells or barbell; bench
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** medium / high
- **Loading type:** unilateral
- **Best for:** unilateral quad and glute hypertrophy
- **Progression route:** heavier load; deficit BSS
- **Regression route:** split squat
- **Key cues:** long stance; vertical front shin or slight forward; control the descent
- **Common mistakes:** stance too short; bouncing the back knee
- **Constraint flags:** knee; hip
- **Substitution options:** reverse lunge; rear-foot-elevated step-up
- **Notes:** Workhorse unilateral leg lift.

### Cossack Squat (Loaded)
- **Movement pattern:** lunge_split_squat
- **Category tags:** mobility_restoration; combat_sport_support
- **Primary muscles:** adductors; quads; glutes
- **Secondary muscles:** hamstrings; core
- **Equipment:** dumbbell; KB
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** medium / medium
- **Loading type:** unilateral
- **Best for:** lateral squat tolerance
- **Progression route:** heavier Cossack
- **Regression route:** bodyweight Cossack
- **Key cues:** full ROM; ribs up; shift weight side to side
- **Common mistakes:** cutting depth; lifting heel
- **Constraint flags:** hip; knee; groin
- **Substitution options:** lateral lunge; ATG split squat
- **Notes:** Frontal-plane mobility plus strength.

### Curtsy Lunge
- **Movement pattern:** lunge_split_squat
- **Category tags:** bodybuilding_accessory; unilateral
- **Primary muscles:** glute medius; glute max
- **Secondary muscles:** adductors; quads
- **Equipment:** dumbbells
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / low
- **Loading type:** unilateral
- **Best for:** glute medius hypertrophy

- **Regression route:** reverse lunge
- **Key cues:** step behind and slightly across; control
- **Common mistakes:** excess knee valgus
- **Constraint flags:** knee
- **Substitution options:** lateral lunge; hip abduction
- **Notes:** Programs cleanly with a stronger compound earlier.

### Split Squat Iso Hold
- **Movement pattern:** lunge_split_squat
- **Category tags:** prehab_rehab_support; isometric; unilateral
- **Primary muscles:** quads; glutes
- **Secondary muscles:** adductors; core
- **Equipment:** floor
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / medium
- **Loading type:** isometric
- **Best for:** knee/hip tolerance
- **Progression route:** loaded split squat iso
- **Regression route:** half-kneeling iso
- **Key cues:** long split; vertical shin; ribs down
- **Common mistakes:** knee cave; short stance
- **Constraint flags:** knee; hip
- **Substitution options:** wall sit; Spanish squat
- **Notes:** Pain-gated; tolerance support.

### Step-Down (Controlled Eccentric)
- **Movement pattern:** lunge_split_squat
- **Category tags:** prehab_rehab_support; eccentric; unilateral
- **Primary muscles:** quads; glutes; VMO
- **Secondary muscles:** hamstrings
- **Equipment:** box
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / low
- **Loading type:** unilateral
- **Best for:** knee control under eccentric
- **Progression route:** taller box
- **Regression route:** mini-step-down
- **Key cues:** knee tracks toe; heel light on ground; controlled
- **Common mistakes:** knee cave; rushing
- **Constraint flags:** knee
- **Substitution options:** Peterson step-up; Spanish squat iso
- **Notes:** Pain-gated; knee tolerance support.

### Walking Lunge
- **Movement pattern:** lunge_split_squat
- **Category tags:** GPP; combat_sport_support; unilateral
- **Primary muscles:** quads; glutes
- **Secondary muscles:** hamstrings; adductors; core
- **Equipment:** dumbbells; barbell; sandbag
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / high
- **Loading type:** unilateral
- **Best for:** conditioning-heavy unilateral work
- **Progression route:** heavier load; longer distance
- **Regression route:** reverse lunge
- **Key cues:** long step; vertical shin; tall chest
- **Common mistakes:** short stride; collapsing torso
- **Constraint flags:** knee
- **Substitution options:** reverse lunge; sled drag
- **Notes:** High GPP value when programmed for distance.

### Walking Lunge (Loaded)
- **Movement pattern:** lunge_split_squat

- **Secondary muscles:** core; adductors

- **Regression route:** reverse lunge
- **Key cues:** long stride; vertical shin; ribs up
- **Common mistakes:** short stride; trunk lean
- **Constraint flags:** knee; hip
- **Substitution options:** reverse lunge; forward lunge
- **Notes:** Volume conditioning lower-body.


## loaded_carry

### Bear Crawl Conditioning (Heavy Vest)

- **Category tags:** conditioning; combat_sport_support; GPP
- **Primary muscles:** core; deltoid; quads
- **Secondary muscles:** pec; trap
- **Equipment:** floor; weighted vest
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / high
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** grappling-specific conditioning
- **Progression route:** heavier vest
- **Regression route:** bodyweight bear crawl
- **Key cues:** knees low; opposite arm/leg; quiet feet
- **Common mistakes:** high hips; rushing
- **Constraint flags:** wrist; shoulder
- **Substitution options:** sled drag; sandbag run
- **Notes:** Combat sport carryover.

### Bottoms-Up KB Carry

- **Primary muscles:** cuff; deltoid; forearms
- **Secondary muscles:** core
- **Equipment:** kettlebell
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** medium / medium
- **Loading type:** unilateral
- **Best for:** cuff stability under load

- **Regression route:** bottoms-up KB hold
- **Key cues:** crush handle; ribs down; long arm
- **Common mistakes:** tipping bell; leaning torso
- **Constraint flags:** wrist; shoulder; overhead_sensitive
- **Substitution options:** BU KB press; suitcase carry
- **Notes:** Cuff endurance plus grip.

### Farmer Walk
- **Movement pattern:** loaded_carry
- **Category tags:** strongman; GPP; grip_neck
- **Primary muscles:** trap; grip; quad; glute
- **Secondary muscles:** core; calf; forearm
- **Equipment:** farmer handles or dumbbells
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / high
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** grip; whole-body stiffness; GPP
- **Progression route:** heavier load; longer distance; turns
- **Regression route:** shorter distance; lighter load
- **Key cues:** tall posture; brace; smooth steps
- **Common mistakes:** forward lean; rushed cadence
- **Constraint flags:** grip_sensitive
- **Substitution options:** suitcase carry; trap-bar carry
- **Notes:** The flagship carry. Pair distance with goal: strength (short heavy) vs conditioning (long moderate).

- **Common mistakes:** leaning; losing grip
- **Constraint flags:** lumbar; grip_sensitive

### Zercher Carry

## core_anti_extension

### Ab Wheel Rollout (From Knees)
- **Movement pattern:** core_anti_extension
- **Category tags:** core; bodybuilding_accessory
- **Primary muscles:** rectus abdominis; obliques
- **Secondary muscles:** lat; serratus
- **Equipment:** ab wheel
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** medium / medium
- **Loading type:** bodyweight
- **Best for:** anti-extension strength
- **Progression route:** standing ab wheel rollout
- **Regression route:** band-assisted rollout
- **Key cues:** ribs down; control descent; pull hips toward heels on return
- **Common mistakes:** lumbar arching at end range
- **Constraint flags:** lumbar; shoulder
- **Substitution options:** long-lever plank; banded rollout
- **Notes:** Build tolerance; do not chase ROM until full hollow is maintained.

### Arch Body Hold (Superman)
- **Movement pattern:** core_anti_extension
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; isometric
- **Primary muscles:** erectors; glutes; hamstrings
- **Secondary muscles:** rear delt; trap
- **Equipment:** floor
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / low

- **Best for:** posterior chain shape for skills
- **Progression route:** arch body rock
- **Regression route:** prone hip extension
- **Key cues:** long body; squeeze glutes; lift arms and legs
- **Common mistakes:** hyperextending neck; bending knees
- **Constraint flags:** lumbar; cervical
- **Substitution options:** reverse hyper; arch body rock
- **Notes:** Pair with hollow holds for gymnastic shape work.

### Dragon Flag
- **Movement pattern:** core_anti_extension
- **Category tags:** core; calisthenics_gymnastics
- **Primary muscles:** rectus abdominis; obliques; hip flexor
- **Secondary muscles:** lat; glutes
- **Equipment:** bench
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** very_high / medium
- **Loading type:** bodyweight
- **Best for:** elite anti-extension strength
- **Progression route:** negatives; full dragon flag for reps
- **Regression route:** tuck dragon flag
- **Key cues:** lock shoulders to bench; long line head-to-toe
- **Common mistakes:** piking at hips
- **Constraint flags:** cervical; lumbar
- **Substitution options:** ab wheel rollout; hanging leg raise
- **Notes:** Use cautiously due to cervical demand.

### High V-Sit (Parallettes)
- **Movement pattern:** core_anti_extension; trunk_flexion_extension_rotation

- **Primary muscles:** hip flexors; quads; deltoid; pec
- **Secondary muscles:** core; lat

- **Constraint flags:** wrist; shoulder
- **Substitution options:** V-sit; manna progression
- **Notes:** Direct step into the manna chain.

- **Regression route:** tuck hollow hold

- **Common mistakes:** lumbar arching; arms too high
- **Constraint flags:** 
- **Substitution options:** dead bug; long-lever plank
- **Notes:** The reference position for all gymnastics work.

### Long-Lever Plank
- **Movement pattern:** core_anti_extension
- **Category tags:** core; isometric
- **Primary muscles:** rectus abdominis; obliques

### Manna Progression (Seated)
- **Movement pattern:** core_anti_extension; trunk_flexion_extension_rotation
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; isometric
- **Primary muscles:** hip flexors; quads; pec; deltoid anterior
- **Secondary muscles:** core; lat; wrist
- **Equipment:** floor; parallettes
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** very_high / high
- **Loading type:** isometric
- **Best for:** elite L-sit family capstone
- **Progression route:** full manna
- **Regression route:** high V-sit; reverse leans seated
- **Key cues:** depress shoulders hard; flex hips aggressively; lean back
- **Common mistakes:** loss of compression; humping under load; using momentum
- **Constraint flags:** wrist; shoulder; hip_flexor_high_load
- **Substitution options:** high V-sit; reverse leans
- **Notes:** Years of compression and straight-arm work. Pain-gated.

- **Constraint flags:** lumbar
- **Substitution options:** dead bug; banded march
- **Notes:** Pain-gated; hip flexor support.

### RKC Plank
- **Movement pattern:** core_anti_extension
- **Category tags:** core; isometric
- **Primary muscles:** rectus abdominis; obliques; glutes
- **Secondary muscles:** quads; lat
- **Equipment:** bodyweight
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / medium
- **Loading type:** isometric
- **Best for:** maximum-effort short plank
- **Progression route:** weighted RKC plank; long-lever plank
- **Regression route:** standard plank
- **Key cues:** elbows under shoulders; squeeze everything; 10-20 seconds max effort
- **Common mistakes:** long holds at low intensity
- **Constraint flags:** 
- **Substitution options:** long-lever plank; dead bug
- **Notes:** Maximally tense for short duration; not a 2-minute hold.

### Standing Ab Wheel Rollout
- **Movement pattern:** core_anti_extension
- **Category tags:** core; calisthenics_gymnastics
- **Primary muscles:** rectus abdominis; obliques; lat
- **Secondary muscles:** serratus; glutes
- **Equipment:** ab wheel
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** very_high / medium
- **Loading type:** bodyweight
- **Best for:** elite anti-extension
- **Progression route:** weighted rollout; ring rollout
- **Regression route:** kneeling rollout
- **Key cues:** ribs down; bring hips back through
- **Common mistakes:** losing hollow at end range
- **Constraint flags:** lumbar; shoulder
- **Substitution options:** ring rollout; kneeling rollout
- **Notes:** Multi-month progression from knees.

### V-Sit (Parallettes)
- **Movement pattern:** core_anti_extension; trunk_flexion_extension_rotation
- **Category tags:** calisthenics_gymnastics; isometric
- **Primary muscles:** hip flexors; quads; deltoid anterior; pec
- **Secondary muscles:** core; lat
- **Equipment:** parallettes
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** high / medium
- **Loading type:** isometric
- **Best for:** compression and straight-arm strength
- **Progression route:** high V-sit; manna progression
- **Regression route:** L-sit; tuck L-sit
- **Key cues:** depress shoulders; lift legs above hip line; lean torso back
- **Common mistakes:** piking under hip line; bent knees; rounding back
- **Constraint flags:** wrist; shoulder
- **Substitution options:** L-sit; high V-sit
- **Notes:** Step between L-sit and manna.

### Copenhagen Plank
- **Movement pattern:** core_anti_lateral_flexion
- **Category tags:** core; prehab_rehab_support; combat_sport_support

- **Secondary muscles:** quadratus lumborum; glute medius

- **Regression route:** short-lever Copenhagen (knee on bench)

- **Common mistakes:** too long a lever too early
- **Constraint flags:** hip
- **Substitution options:** side plank; Cossack squat
- **Notes:** Critical adductor tendon health drill for grapplers and soccer-style athletes.

- **Progression route:** 60-90 min steady
- **Regression route:** 30 min steady
- **Key cues:** nasal breathing; HR 130-150; steady effort
- **Common mistakes:** going too hard; using arms only
- **Constraint flags:** none specified
- **Substitution options:** easy run; rower steady-state
- **Notes:** Jamieson-style cardiac output method.

## jumps_throws_power

### Altitude Landing
- **Movement pattern:** jumps_throws_power

- **Primary muscles:** quads; glutes; calves

- **Regression route:** pogo absorb

- **Common mistakes:** wobbling out of landing
- **Constraint flags:** knee; ankle; tendon_high_load
- **Substitution options:** depth jump; box jump
- **Notes:** Landing-only variant for tendon prep.

### Box Jump
- **Movement pattern:** jumps_throws_power
- **Category tags:** plyometric; GPP
- **Primary muscles:** quads; glutes; hamstrings
- **Secondary muscles:** calf; core
- **Equipment:** box
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** medium / medium

- **Best for:** vertical jump expression

- **Regression route:** step-up to box

- **Common mistakes:** landing in deep squat; jumping for ego height
- **Constraint flags:** knee; ankle
- **Substitution options:** broad jump; vertical jump
- **Notes:** Step down from the box every rep to control eccentric.

- **Regression route:** med-ball chest pass
- **Key cues:** full extension overhead; slam through ground
- **Common mistakes:** half ROM; passive descent
- **Constraint flags:** shoulder; lumbar; overhead_sensitive
- **Substitution options:** battle rope slam; rotational slam
- **Notes:** Pair with squat jumps for full-body power.

### Med-Ball Rotational Scoop Toss
- **Movement pattern:** jumps_throws_power
- **Category tags:** combat_sport_support; plyometric
- **Primary muscles:** obliques; glutes; core
- **Secondary muscles:** deltoid; lat
- **Equipment:** medicine ball; wall
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / medium
- **Loading type:** unilateral
- **Best for:** rotational power
- **Progression route:** heavier ball; faster cadence
- **Regression route:** half-kneeling rotational throw
- **Key cues:** hips lead; long arms; release at hip
- **Common mistakes:** throwing with arms; soft hip turn
- **Constraint flags:** lumbar
- **Substitution options:** rotational slam; landmine rotation
- **Notes:** Direct carryover to striking/grappling.

- **Substitution options:** calf iso; seated calf raise
- **Notes:** Pain-gated; soleus support.

- **Notes:** Underrated for grappler and lifter elbow health.

- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** medium / medium
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** movement quality conditioning
- **Progression route:** heavier vest
- **Regression route:** single crawl pattern
- **Key cues:** smooth transitions; quiet feet; tall heads
- **Common mistakes:** rushing; losing pattern
- **Constraint flags:** wrist
- **Substitution options:** bear crawl conditioning; FMS crawls
- **Notes:** Lower-impact GPP.

## programming_method

### Cluster Set (Method Entry)
- **Movement pattern:** programming_method
- **Category tags:** powerlifting
- **Primary muscles:** pattern-dependent
- **Secondary muscles:** pattern-dependent
- **Equipment:** pattern-dependent
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / high
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** strength-quality density
- **Progression route:** heavier cluster set
- **Regression route:** straight sets
- **Key cues:** heavy load; 1-3 reps; 10-20s intra-set rest; total 5-10 reps
- **Common mistakes:** too long rest; too light load
- **Constraint flags:** pattern-specific
- **Substitution options:** straight sets; EMOM
- **Notes:** Method entry; main-lift only.

### Contrast Pair Method Entry (PAP)
- **Movement pattern:** programming_method
- **Category tags:** plyometric; olympic_lifting_power
- **Primary muscles:** pattern-dependent
- **Secondary muscles:** pattern-dependent
- **Equipment:** pattern-dependent
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** high / high
- **Loading type:** ballistic
- **Best for:** post-activation power
- **Progression route:** heavier primer; faster plyo
- **Regression route:** straight sets
- **Key cues:** heavy primer 1-3 reps; rest 3-5 min; ballistic 3-5 reps
- **Common mistakes:** skipping rest; light primer
- **Constraint flags:** pattern-specific
- **Substitution options:** contrast pair; cluster sets
- **Notes:** Method entry; e.g. heavy squat plus jump.

### Density Block (Method Entry)
- **Movement pattern:** programming_method
- **Category tags:** conditioning; GPP
- **Primary muscles:** pattern-dependent
- **Secondary muscles:** pattern-dependent
- **Equipment:** pattern-dependent
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / high
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** density training
- **Progression route:** more rounds; heavier load
- **Regression route:** standard sets
- **Key cues:** complete X reps in Y minutes; track and beat next session
- **Common mistakes:** choosing impossible targets
- **Constraint flags:** pattern-specific
- **Substitution options:** EMOM; AMRAP
- **Notes:** Method entry; carryover for GPP.

### Drop Set (Method Entry)
- **Movement pattern:** programming_method
- **Category tags:** bodybuilding_accessory
- **Primary muscles:** pattern-dependent
- **Secondary muscles:** pattern-dependent
- **Equipment:** pattern-dependent
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / high
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** hypertrophy intensification
- **Progression route:** double drop; mechanical drop
- **Regression route:** straight sets
- **Key cues:** 1 working set to failure; reduce load 20-30 percent; continue to failure
- **Common mistakes:** too few drops; using heavy compound lifts
- **Constraint flags:** pattern-specific
- **Substitution options:** myo-reps; rest-pause
- **Notes:** Method entry; isolation-bias compatible.

### Heavy Slow Resistance (HSR) (Method Entry)

- **Category tags:** prehab_rehab_support
- **Primary muscles:** pattern-dependent

### Myo-Reps (Method Entry on Compatible Lift)
- **Movement pattern:** programming_method
- **Category tags:** bodybuilding_accessory
- **Primary muscles:** pattern-dependent
- **Secondary muscles:** pattern-dependent
- **Equipment:** pattern-dependent
- **Skill cost / Fatigue cost:** low / high
- **Loading type:** bilateral
- **Best for:** hypertrophy intensification method
- **Progression route:** cluster sets; rest-pause
- **Regression route:** straight sets
- **Key cues:** 1 activation set to near failure; 3-5 micro-sets of 3-5 reps with 10-20s rest
- **Common mistakes:** too much load; chasing failure on activation
- **Constraint flags:** pattern-specific
- **Substitution options:** rest-pause; drop set
- **Notes:** Method entry; pair with isolation patterns. Not a standalone lift.

- **Notes:** Method entry; safe on isolation movements.
